articles.author: Kevin Breuninger
articles.title: U.S. military denies Iran's claim it struck American warship in Strait of Hormuz - CNBC
articles.description: Iran has blocked tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz since the U.S. and Israel started the war in late February, resulting in supply and price shocks.
articles.content:
U.S. Central Command on Monday denied claims from Iranian state media that a U.S. warship transiting the Strait of Hormuz was struck by two missiles and forced to retreat.

articles.title: Iran warns US Navy against entering Strait of Hormuz - Financial Times
articles.description: Oil surrenders some gains after Washington denies claim that Tehran had struck an American warship
